stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
In the summer, the trade winds over the Atlantic Ocean will be found in the latitude band indicated by the letter (1) _____, and the typical conditions are (2) _____.

options.b: (1) V; (2) fair weather Cumulus or Stratocumulus.
options.c: (1) U; (2) fair weather Cumulus or Stratocumulus.
